name: platter
description: MCP server exposing Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, and JS tools over stdio.
long_description: Platter gives AI agents controlled access to a computer's resources — filesystem, shell, and a persistent JavaScript runtime. Ships as a single standalone binary with configurable path/command allowlists and an optional sandboxed bash mode.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read file contents with pagination. Truncates to 2000 lines or 50KB.

tools.name: write
tools.description: Create or overwrite files. Auto-creates parent directories.

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Find-and-replace with exact or fuzzy matching. Returns a unified diff.

tools.name: bash
tools.description: Execute shell commands with optional timeout and reattachment.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search file contents with ripgrep. Requires rg installed on the host.

tools.name: js
tools.description: Evaluate JavaScript/TypeScript in a persistent runtime with await and package loading.
